# Logwick API

Base URL: https://logwick.io/api/v1
Auth: Authorization: Bearer sk-lw-your-key

## Endpoints

POST /logs — Ingest a log entry
GET /logs — Query logs (params: status, agent, action, search, from, to, limit, offset, format)
GET /logs/stream — Stream logs via SSE
GET /stats — Usage statistics (params: days)
GET / — Public API discovery (no auth)

## x402 Endpoints (no account required)

POST /agent-log — Pay $0.001 USDC per log on Base (eip155:8453)
GET /agent-log — Returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements
GET /agent-logs — Query logs by wallet (params: wallet, signature, message)
GET /agent-stats — Stats by wallet (params: wallet, signature, message)

## Required fields

agent (string) — AI model name e.g. gpt-4o
action (string) — Task type e.g. email_draft

## Optional fields

status, input, output, user, tokens, latency_ms, cost_usd, tags, metadata

## OpenAPI spec

https://logwick.io/openapi.json
